race.comment: CELEBES SEA (2) created a huge impression on debut last start, making a long, sustained run to hit the lead in the lane before clearing right away at the end of 1200m at Kembla. Safe to say she will be more at home out to 1400m so despite the class rise she can win again. GLASTONBURY GIRL (6) opened this campaign with a couple of nice efforts, including a placing over this trip at Kembla second-up. Pulled up with issues last time in a run worth overlooking. Nicely drawn and can bounce back. LADY PANKHURST (1) was handy enough on the bend but ran out of condition when resuming over 1200m at Kembla three weeks ago. Ran decent races at stakes level over this trip last prep. Watch for a much better performance. MY SHAREENA (7) resumes. Improved as the prep went on when last in work, but she should give a good account.
